[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@empathyco/x-types](./x-types.md) &gt; [EditableNumberRangeFilter](./x-types.editablenumberrangefilter.md)

## EditableNumberRangeFilter interface

A type of filter used in [EditableNumberRangeFacet](./x-types.editablenumberrangefacet.md) and extends from [FacetFilter](./x-types.facetfilter.md)<!-- -->. This filter has the particularity that its [RangeValue](./x-types.rangevalue.md) is editable by the user. Editable means that the value max and min can be changed by the user instead of having several boolean filters with different values.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface EditableNumberRangeFilter extends FacetFilter 
```
<b>Extends:</b> [FacetFilter](./x-types.facetfilter.md)

## Properties

|  Property | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [modelName](./x-types.editablenumberrangefilter.modelname.md) | 'EditableNumberRangeFilter' | Model name to indicate the filter type. |
|  [range](./x-types.editablenumberrangefilter.range.md) | [RangeValue](./x-types.rangevalue.md) | Filter range to use in the frontend. |
